description: Indexed skills intentionally outside the deterministic routing benchmark. Add a corpus case when an exclusion gains a stable, testable routing contract.

exclusions.adr-consultation: No deterministic fast-path contract; the route depends on the architecture decision context.
exclusions.agent-comparison: Lifecycle companion selected by an orchestration workflow, not a stable direct route.
exclusions.agent-evaluation: Lifecycle companion selected by an orchestration workflow, not a stable direct route.
exclusions.architecture-deepening: Architecture judgment route; no stable deterministic trigger contract.
exclusions.auto-dream: Scheduled lifecycle component, not a direct user-intent route.
exclusions.bluesky-reader: External-content route requires provider and task context beyond a stable trigger.
exclusions.business-ops: Broad umbrella skill; benchmark it through its narrower business skills rather than one trigger.
exclusions.cli-design: Semantic design route; no stable deterministic trigger contract.
exclusions.code-cleanup: Semantic code-quality route; no stable deterministic trigger contract.
exclusions.code-linting: Semantic code-quality route; no stable deterministic trigger contract.
exclusions.codebase-overview: Semantic repository-exploration route; no stable deterministic trigger contract.
exclusions.comment-quality: Semantic code-quality route; no stable deterministic trigger contract.
exclusions.condense: Editorial judgment route; no stable deterministic trigger contract.
exclusions.condition-based-waiting: Process companion selected by workflow state, not direct user intent.
exclusions.create-voice: Voice-calibration route requires supplied samples and profile context.
exclusions.cron-automation: Infrastructure route requires environment and scheduling context.
exclusions.data-analysis: Semantic analysis route; no stable deterministic trigger contract.
exclusions.decision-helper: Semantic decision-support route; no stable deterministic trigger contract.
exclusions.design: Semantic design route; no stable deterministic trigger contract.
exclusions.e2e-testing: Testing-method route; no stable deterministic trigger contract.
exclusions.enterprise-search: Engineering route requires repository and search-system context.
exclusions.explanation-traces: Debugging companion selected by workflow state, not direct user intent.
exclusions.forensics: Investigation route requires incident evidence and scope context.
exclusions.full-repo-review: Review tier is chosen from repository scope, not a stable trigger alone.
exclusions.game-pipeline: Game-production route requires project and asset context.
exclusions.generate-claudemd: Documentation companion selected by an orchestration workflow, not a stable direct route.
exclusions.github-notification-triage: External GitHub state is required to make the route useful.
exclusions.html-artifact: Artifact-format route depends on requested deliverable context.
exclusions.image-gen: Image-generation route depends on visual task context and available provider.
exclusions.install: Environment bootstrap route requires local installation state.
exclusions.joy-check: Editorial judgment companion selected by content workflow state.
exclusions.kotlin: Language route is selected with implementation context and agent pairing.
exclusions.kubernetes: Infrastructure route requires cluster and deployment context.
exclusions.learn: Lifecycle component for recorded corrections, not a direct user-intent route.
exclusions.markdown-converter: Conversion route depends on supplied input format and tooling context.
exclusions.marketing: Semantic business route; no stable deterministic trigger contract.
exclusions.objective-loop: Execution companion selected by objective lifecycle, not direct user intent.
exclusions.opensearch-detection-engineer: Specialized engineering route requires system and incident context.
exclusions.pair-programming: Collaboration mode is selected by operator preference, not a stable trigger.
exclusions.parallel-code-review: Review tier is chosen from change scope and risk, not a stable trigger alone.
exclusions.php: Language route is selected with implementation context and agent pairing.
exclusions.plant-seed: Lifecycle companion selected by deferred-work context, not direct user intent.
exclusions.professional-communication: Writing route depends on audience and message context.
exclusions.public-web-deploy: Deployment route requires provider and target-environment context.
exclusions.publish: Publishing route requires content state and destination context.
exclusions.read-only-ops: Execution-mode companion selected by safety constraints, not direct user intent.
exclusions.reference-enrichment: Lifecycle component selected after a reference-quality diagnosis.
exclusions.repo-value-analysis: External-repository route requires a supplied repository and evaluation goal.
exclusions.research-pipeline: Research workflow needs scope and source requirements beyond a stable trigger.
exclusions.retro: Lifecycle component for completed work, not a direct user-intent route.
exclusions.routing-table-updater: Governance companion selected after routing metadata changes.
exclusions.sapcc-audit: Organization-specific engineering route is unavailable in a portable benchmark.
exclusions.sapcc-review: Organization-specific engineering route is unavailable in a portable benchmark.
exclusions.service-health-check: Infrastructure route requires service and runtime context.
exclusions.session-handoff: Lifecycle component for session state, not a direct user-intent route.
exclusions.shell-config: Environment configuration route requires shell and host context.
exclusions.shell-process-patterns: Environment configuration route requires shell and host context.
exclusions.skill-eval: Evaluation workflow requires an explicit target and scoring context.
exclusions.socratic-debugging: Interaction mode is selected by coaching preference, not a stable trigger.
exclusions.subagent-driven-development: Execution strategy is selected after planning, not direct user intent.
exclusions.swift: Language route is selected with implementation context and agent pairing.
exclusions.testing-agents-with-subagents: Evaluation workflow requires an explicit agent target and harness context.
exclusions.testing-preferred-patterns: Testing-method route; no stable deterministic trigger contract.
exclusions.threejs-builder: Frontend route requires visual and rendering context.
exclusions.toolkit-evolution: Scheduled or explicit governance workflow, not a deterministic fast path.
exclusions.translate: Translation route requires source and target language context.
exclusions.typescript-check: Code-quality route requires project tooling context.
exclusions.universal-quality-gate: Code-quality route requires language and project tooling context.
exclusions.verification-before-completion: Completion companion selected by work state, not direct user intent.
exclusions.video-editing: Media route requires source assets and desired output context.
exclusions.vitest-runner: Test-runner route requires JavaScript project tooling context.
exclusions.voice-validator: Voice route requires an active target profile and draft context.
exclusions.voice-writer: Writing route requires audience, source, and voice context.
exclusions.wordpress-live-validation: Browser route requires a deployed WordPress target.
exclusions.workflow: Workflow selection is a fallback based on task complexity, not a stable trigger alone.

exclusions.x-api: External publishing route requires authenticated account and content context.
